prediction.reasoning: Based on historical AAPL volatility of approximately 25-30% annually, which translates to roughly 1.6-1.9% daily volatility. For a 22-day period, this suggests a standard deviation of around 7.5-8.5%. Applied geometric Brownian motion with slight positive drift reflecting long-term equity risk premium. Confidence intervals calculated using normal distribution assumptions around log returns.
